description_long: This is a smooth-skinned, light green frog with a streamlined body and long, slender limbs. Its head is broad and rounded, with prominent, bulging eyes positioned on either side, giving it a wide field of vision. The front limbs are relatively short with splayed fingers, while the hind legs are elongated and muscular, adapted for powerful jumps. The skin appears moist and slightly glossy, typical of many amphibians, and the coloration is uniform pale green with lighter tones on the underside and digits. The toes are tipped with rounded pads, suggesting an adaptation for climbing or gripping surfaces. Overall, the animal has a sleek, agile appearance, well-suited for both terrestrial and arboreal environments.
description: A pale green frog with smooth, glossy skin, long limbs, and prominent eyes. Its slender body and splayed toes suggest agility and climbing ability.
description_view_0: Front view shows the broad head, large eyes, and splayed front limbs with visible toe pads.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the streamlined body, muscular hind leg, and the curvature of the back.
description_view_2: Top view reveals the full dorsal surface, showing the smooth, uniform green skin and the symmetry of the limbs.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, emphasizing the elongated hind limb and the frog's poised, crouched posture.
